Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Full-body Enforcer technique]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The full-body Enforcer technique is common and flexible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Full-body Enforcement often radiates light or has external markings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian's speed is powered by the full-body Enforcer technique.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Malice's full-body Enforcer technique makes her sink deeper into the ground.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Charity uses a full-body Enforcer technique.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Archlady's full-body Enforcer technique is a smooth, blue-white flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Archlord man's full-body Enforcer technique is a rough black-and-red blaze.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Pride uses a basic full-body Enforcer technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
